title: [FIRRTL] Assertion type `trueOrIsX` looks like it has some problems
body:
When using `trueOrIsX`, SFC will error if the condition is `1`, MFC will error if the condition is `1` or `x`.  In addition to this, it looks like we need to include all outer conditions when comparing to `x`.
```
when a:
  when b:
    trueOrIsX(clock, message)
```
```
SFC: (a & b) && (a & b) !== 1'bx
MFC: a & (b | b === 1'bx)
```

Full example:
```
circuit Foo:
  module Foo:
    input a: UInt<1>
    input b: UInt<1>
    input clock: Clock

    when a:
      when b:
        printf(clock, UInt<1>("h1"), "Assertion failed: [verif-library-assert]<extraction-summary>{\"predicateModifier\":{\"type\":\"trueOrIsX\"},\"format\":{\"type\":\"ifElseFatal\"},\"baseMsg\":\"Assertion failed (verification library): Test assert\"}</extraction-summary>\n    at Assert.scala:71 chisel3.assert(predicate, flag + exStr, msgArgs: _*)(sourceInfo, compileOptions)\n") : printf @[ToTL.scala 163:49]
  ```
  
I could not get the small example to go through SFC as is, I added the assert to an existing module and this is post ExtractTestCode.  Here is SFC:
```verilog
//VCS coverage exclude_file
module SiFive_AHBToTL_assert(
  input   clock,
  input   a,
  input   b
);
  wire  _GEN_0 = b & a;
  `ifndef SYNTHESIS
  always @(posedge clock) begin
    `ifdef ASSERT_VERBOSE_COND
    if (`ASSERT_VERBOSE_COND) begin
    `endif
      if ((_GEN_0 && ~(^(_GEN_0) === 1'bx))) begin
        $error("Assertion failed (verification library): Test Assert");
      end
    `ifdef ASSERT_VERBOSE_COND
    end
    `endif
    `ifdef STOP_COND
    if (`STOP_COND) begin
    `endif
      if ((_GEN_0 && ~(^(_GEN_0) === 1'bx))) begin
        $fatal;
      end
    `ifdef STOP_COND
    end
    `endif
  end
  `endif // SYNTHESIS

endmodule
```

MFC:
```verilog
module Foo(     // ./test.fir:2:10
  input a, b, clock);

  always @(posedge clock) begin // ./test.fir:8:7
    `ifndef SYNTHESIS   // ./test.fir:8:7
      if (a & (b | b === 1'bx)) begin   // ./test.fir:8:7
        if (`ASSERT_VERBOSE_COND_)      // ./test.fir:8:7
          $error("Assertion failed (verification library): Test assert");       // ./test.fir:8:7
        if (`STOP_COND_)        // ./test.fir:8:7
          $fatal;       // ./test.fir:8:7
      end
    `endif
  end // always @(posedge)
endmodule
```
